title: Jerry Thomas Twiggs
text:
Noteable Skills
Proficient in: R (primarily in Rstudio) Python html CSS Javascript

title: Jerry Thomas Twiggs
text:
Education
Brigham Young University - Idaho Jan 2024 - present Data Science major 3.92 GPA
University of Utah Sep 2020- Apr 2021 Quantitative Analysis of Markets and Organizations major 3.83 GPA
Utah Tech University Associate's degree - Associate of Science Sep 2018 - Apr 2020 Honor Roll 3.72 GPA
ACE / Success Academy Dixie High School Diploma Sep 2016 - Apr 2020 Honor Roll 3.72 GPA

title: Jerry Thomas Twiggs
text:

Sterling Scholarship Winner 2020 New Century Scholarship recipient 2020 Licensed Life & Health Insurance Agent

title: Jerry Thomas Twiggs
text:

Proficient with online tutoring software
Prep Cook Pasta Factory, Saint George, Utah May 2021 - Oct 2021
Piano Instructor Resonance School of Musicianship, Santa Clara, Utah Oct 2019 - May 2020
